title: Creamy Low-Fat Noodles
description: A buttery and creamy Chinese dish featuring noodles with a twist of low-fat elements for a romantic dinner.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
If using pork, add it to the skillet with the onions and cook until browned on all sides.
Add cubed potatoes to the skillet with the onions and pork. Stir in low-sodium chicken broth and vegetable broth concentrate. Bring to a simmer and let cook for about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium-low, add shredded carrots, cooked pasta, and low-fat soy sauce. Mix well until all ingredients are coated with the sauce.
Stir in low-fat heavy cream and continue cooking until the mixture is heated through, stirring occasionally.
If using tofu, add it at this point along with any remaining seasoning if needed to taste.
